messages.author: RedHare
messages.text: yeah, i think organizing by interest level could be good. i can definitely help with wording for surface/beginner level info. my knowledge spheres are mostly IT and increasingly radio, but not much of the latter, so i’d need to learn a lot about how things work to write advanced docs
messages.content_html: yeah, i think organizing by interest level could be good. i can definitely help with wording for surface/beginner level info. my knowledge spheres are mostly IT and increasingly radio, but not much of the latter, so i’d need to learn a lot about how things work to write advanced docs

messages.author: FlightlessApteryx | AE9Y
messages.text: Eyy also in tech. For me, an overhaul is tempting but there's so much content there I think starting with organization + bare minimum to make the organization make sense, then iterating over "make answers better" is probably the most sustainable process that doesn't chain it to one person doing a big bang thing
